title: Difference in Cost-Effectiveness of Trastuzumab Deruxtecan in First-Line Versus Later-Line Settings for HER2-Low Metastatic Breast Cancer.
abstract: Trastuzumab deruxtecan (T-DXd) is approved as first-line therapy for HER2-low metastatic breast cancer after endocrine therapy failure and as later-line therapy, but economic evidence comparing these two settings to inform sequencing decisions is lacking.
trial_name: Trastuzumab Deruxtecan after Endocrine Therapy in Metastatic Breast Cancer
